title: Figure 1 in Detection of Coxiella burnetii (Gammaproteobacteria: Coxiellaceae) in ticks collected from infested dogs in Kerman, Southeast of Iran

description: Figure 1. Detection of C. burnetii DNA in ticks collected from dogs by nested PCR (icd gen), Column 1, molecular size markers (100-bp DNA ladder); Column 2, positive control; Column 3, negative control; Column 4 positive sample.
